tools.name: assess_product_compliance
tools.description: ComplianceCN 市场准入检查的规则评估层：根据产品属性和目标市场返回适用、不适用或待确认的市场准入要求、缺失信息与官方来源。Rule-assessment layer of the same ComplianceCN market-access check; returns applicable, excluded and unresolved requirements with citations.

tools.name: preflight_product
tools.description: ComplianceCN 市场准入检查的第一阶段（含Stage 0暂定产品分类）：这是为完整准备流程收集事实、识别已持有证据和发现缺口的预检，不是最终交付。智能体可以提交普通产品描述、已知产品事实、文件名、供应商说法或已提取的证据信息，不需要上传文件，也不要求用户先给文件分类。预检完成后，必须使用同一产品资料调用 generate_next_step_pack，生成卖家可执行的供应商、实验室、平台或专项复核准备材料；只有用户明确同意并提供邮箱时才调用 request_human_review。系统绝不返回‘合规通过’结论。Stage one is an intake and readiness

tools.name: generate_next_step_pack
tools.description: ComplianceCN 市场准入检查的第二阶段：应在 preflight_product 第一阶段完成后调用，基于同一产品资料和预检缺口选择四条路线之一（供应商补证据、实验室测试路径、平台提交复核包、专项专业复核），并生成供应商文件请求、实验室简报、平台材料索引、官方/标准化表格字段草稿和人工复核摘要。只生成操作草稿，不给出合规批准、认证或法律意见。Stage two of the same ComplianceCN market-access check: call after preflight_product, then draft supplier/lab/marketplace/s

tools.name: request_human_review
tools.description: Agent-callable handoff from automated market-access preflight into the human review stage of the same ComplianceCN Check. Use only after preflight_product reaches a review gate or the user explicitly asks for human review. Requires explicit contact consent, creates a private lead, returns a referenc

tools.name: watch_product_regulatory_changes
tools.description: Start Stripe Checkout for a paid ComplianceCN product-change alert subscription with a free trial. Call only after preflight_product has produced a usable product/market profile and the seller explicitly asks to be notified. The subscription emails when a human-reviewed ComplianceCN changelog update

tools.name: register_mcp_contact
tools.description: 在匿名 MCP 试用次数用完后登记卖家的邮箱，并取得额外五次工具调用。只能在用户明确同意 ComplianceCN 通过邮箱联系后调用；这不是人工复核申请。After the anonymous MCP allowance is used, record a seller email and grant five additional substantive tool calls. Call only after the user explicitly consents to email contact; this does not submit a human-review case.

tools.name: compare_market_requirements
tools.description: 比较同一产品进入两个或以上市场时的标志、境内主体、风险和官方来源。Compare marks, local-presence duties, risk and sources across two or more markets.

tools.name: explain_claim
tools.description: 按稳定claim ID解释一条合规声明，解析官方证据并显示核验日期或证据缺口。Resolve a stable claim ID to its text, primary-source evidence, verification date, and any editorial evidence gap.

tools.name: describe_coverage
tools.description: 返回数据集版本、覆盖类目与市场、逐项核验状态统计和编辑方法论。调用其他工具前先了解数据可信度。Returns dataset versions, category/market coverage, verification-status tallies and editorial methodology — call this to understand data trustworthiness before relying on other tools.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: request_human_review, watch_product_regulatory_changes · Private data: request_human_review, register_mcp_contact · Public sink: preflight_product, watch_product_regulatory_changes, register_mcp_contact.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: request_human_review, watch_product_regulatory_changes · Private data: request_human_review, register_mcp_contact · Public sink: preflight_product, watch_product_regulatory_changes, register_mcp_contact

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
